strategies.name: title_keyword_v1
strategies.description: Cheap title and subtitle keyword baseline.

strategies.name: full_text_keyword_v1
strategies.description: Current portable lexical retrieval shape: title, subtitle, body, and keywords.

strategies.name: semantic_expansion_v1
strategies.description: Deterministic synonym expansion proxy for semantic retrieval when embeddings are unavailable in CI.

strategies.name: hybrid_plus_boost_v1
strategies.description: Full-text retrieval plus semantic expansion and source-aware boosts.

strategies.name: vector_embedding_v1
strategies.skip_reason: Embeddings are not provisioned in CI; keep this explicit instead of pretending vector search ran.
